notes: Segmenting cron-triggered seed calls (isCronTriggered) out of the interactive-only manual directive call limit (3/day) -- the scheduled heartbeat (morning-pipeline + ingest-and-deliver) was silently sharing that tiny budget with manual testing because seed-from-scorer-core.ts never inherited daily-brief-generate.ts's pipeline-run-context segmentation. See LESSONS_LEARNED #35.
